commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=97c48d15a5b1b22863e1e8cd76aa2778579573a7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a helper in `extensions/telegram/src/send.ts` to strip a trailing standalone `notify=false` line and set `opts.silent = true` before Telegram sending.

PR surface: Source +21. Total +21 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is clear: current main forwards Telegram payload/native reply text unless structured `silent` is already set, while the linked issue shows a trailing `notify=false` marker reaching visible Telegram text. I did not run a fresh live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed because the code blocker spans Telegram delivery boundaries and the external real-proof gate remains incomplete.

target.title: fix(telegram): consume trailing notify=false marker and send silent
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

When agents append a trailing standalone `notify=false` to request silent delivery, the marker leaks into the visible Telegram message body instead of being applied as delivery metadata. Users see `notify=false` as literal text and still get notified.

## Root Cause

`sendMessageTelegram` does not parse the `notify=false` delivery marker from outgoing text. The `opts.silent` flag already maps to `disable_notification=true` in the Telegram API call, but nothing consumes the marker from agent output.

## Fix

Add `consumeTrailingNotifyFalseMarker` — strips a trailing standalone `notify=false` from the message text and sets `opts.silent = true`. 

- **1 file, 21 lines** (including JSDoc)
- Inline mentions like "use notify=false" are preserved
- Marker is only consumed when on its own line at the end

Closes #80569

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Telegram channel

## Evidence

### Real behavior proof — marker parsing

```
$ node proof-80569.ts

✅ trailing standalone → "text"
✅ marker only → ""
✅ whitespace around marker → ""
✅ inline — skipped
✅ not at end — skipped
✅ no marker

6/6 passed
```

### Test suite — no regression

```
$ npx vitest run extensions/telegram/src/send.test.ts

Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       139 passed (139)
Duration    48.83s
```

### Formatting

```
$ pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/telegram/src/send.ts
All matched files use the correct format.
```

## Security Impact

- New permissions? No
- Secrets handling changed? No
- New network calls? No
